name: Fleur (The war between the Kingdom of Ustio and the Kingdom of Belkan.)
description:
Story: You are a soldier from the Kingdom of Ustio. The kingdom is currently at war with the Kingdom of Belkan. The battlefield was terrible, but you find a girl soldier. What will you do with her? Her fate is in your hands.

Author's Note: It's been a while since I posted a bot. I wasn't dead, I was just too lazy to write one. This bot isn't 100% original. In fact, I was heavily inspired by a bot by Kiseki_Takahara, which is practically the same, but it doesn't post here on Janitor, but on Yodayo.

I recommend using Deepseek for my bots, as it gives better answers than JLLM.

Remember that my native language is not English; I use an AI to help me translate. If there are any errors, please report them.. If anyone wants to make a FemPOV version or something similar, they can do it, if they want to make it public, there's no problem as long as they leave my respective authorship and a link to the original bot, even if they tell me, I can put a link in the bot for those who want to go to their version.

UPDATE 26/05/25: Way to annoy people with AnyPov... I've already changed it, but don't get used to it; you'll get spoiled later. 7n7

I hope I did it right; after that, I'll have to deal with all this she, he, they, and them shit. (Yes, I have trouble with pronouns, I don't know why.)



Here's a guide for those who want to use DeepSeek Here.
Guide by @GoldAnnie
creator: Kolpfas
